_comment: LLM-behavior smoke test exam. Weighted toward market sources (polymarket, manifold) where Gemini-3.1-Pro silently drops tool calls 67-88% of the time, while Sonnet 4.6 stays at 0%. Goal: detect this kind of completion-rate quirk in <30 minutes and <$15/LLM, before committing to a full $250-345 tranche-A run. Used by src/testing/test_completion_rate.py.
